movie.actors: Samuel L. Jackson, Colin Farrell, Michelle Rodriguez, LL Cool J
movie.plot: An imprisoned drug kingpin offers a huge cash reward to anyone that can break him out of police custody, and only the L.A.P.D.'s Special Weapons and Tactics team can prevent it.
movie.title: S.W.A.T.
movie.writer: Robert Hamner (characters), Ron Mita (story), Jim McClain (story), David Ayer (screenplay), David McKenna (screenplay)
